channel.title: Networking on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Networking on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In development] Private Preview: Guest RDMA on Azure Boost
item.description:
Guest RDMA is in private preview on Azure in UK South. It uses Azure Boost to enable RDMA in the guest OS for high-throughput, ultra-low-latency networking within the same region.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Managed virtual network for evaluations in Microsoft Foundry
item.description:
Microsoft Foundry now generally supports managed virtual networks for evaluations. This lets cloud evaluation jobs reach models and agents protected by private endpoints using a Foundry-managed VNET for outbound connectivity.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure Virtual Network Manager integration with Virtual WAN
item.description:
Azure Virtual Network Manager now supports integration with Azure Virtual WAN in public preview. You can use an Azure Virtual WAN hub as the hub in Azure Virtual Network Manager hub-and-spoke connectivity configurations.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: User Groups and IP address pools for P2S connections
item.description:
Azure VPN Gateway Point-to-Site connections now support User Groups and IP address pools, letting administrators assign different client IP ranges to remote users based on their credentials.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Summarized advertised gateway prefixes for route advertisement
item.description:
Azure public preview now lets you configure summarized advertised gateway prefixes for route advertisement. Azure gateways, including ExpressRoute and VPN Gateway, can advertise summarized prefixes to on-premises networks instead of all individual prefixes.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure Elastic SAN support for AVS Gen2 Private Cloud
item.description:
Azure Elastic SAN support is now generally available for AVS Gen2 Private Cloud. It simplifies datastore connectivity and configuration by removing the need for an ExpressRoute gateway and using a single Private Endpoint, while also improving performance.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Public Preview: Container Network Insights Agent
item.description:
Azure has launched a public preview of the Container Network Insights Agent for troubleshooting Kubernetes networking issues. It provides a lightweight, web-based way to inspect and correlate network signals that are otherwise spread across multiple tools.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Migrating from virtual network-integrated to Private Endpoint–capable network configuration
item.description:
Azure Database for PostgreSQL servers deployed with virtual network integration can now be migrated to a network configuration that supports Private Endpoint connectivity. This is in public preview.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Disable HTTP proxy in AKS
item.description:
Azure Kubernetes Service now supports disabling HTTP proxy settings in an existing cluster. This helps administrators remove or change proxy configuration as network requirements evolve without needing disruptive cluster changes.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Pod CIDR expansion in AKS
item.description:
Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) now supports generally available Pod CIDR expansion for overlay-based clusters. This lets teams increase the pod IP range when clusters run out of addresses, avoiding cluster rebuilds.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Network Security Perimeter for Azure Service Bus
item.description:
Network Security Perimeter support for Azure Service Bus is now generally available. It lets you define a logical network boundary around Service Bus namespaces and other Azure PaaS resources to block unauthorized public access.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Container network metrics filtering for AKS
item.description:
Azure Container Networking Services (ACNS) for AKS now supports container network metrics filtering in general availability. This lets operators reduce metric volume and focus on operationally relevant data.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Cross-cluster networking in Azure Kubernetes Fleet Manager
item.description:
Azure Kubernetes Fleet Manager is adding cross-cluster networking in public preview. The update targets networking across multiple Kubernetes clusters to improve global service discovery, performance, and observability in distributed microservice environments.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Container network logs in AKS
item.description:
Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) container network logs are now generally available. The feature adds visibility into pod/network traffic to help diagnose Kubernetes networking issues and failures.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Microsoft Azure Kubernetes Application Network
item.description:
Microsoft Azure Kubernetes Application Network is in public preview. It targets Kubernetes environments spread across regions and clusters by adding application-layer networking controls and visibility beyond IP-based networking.

  • Source: Azure Updates
